overall_assessment: BUY — Good returns with acceptable risk. Consider deploying with moderate position sizes.

execution_guidance.limit_offset: limit: Buy below SMA200 or at RSI < 35. Value = patience. Don't rush.
execution_guidance.timing: SAFE TO BUY. Position sizes are already risk-adjusted by volatility — higher vol stocks get smaller positions automatically.
execution_guidance.scaling: Enter in 3 tranches over 4-6 weeks as price confirms bottom.
